# AIXO

> Free, private, browser-based AI toolkit. Merge images and generate expert-level AI prompts — no signup, no tracking.

AIXO is a micro SaaS collection of small, fast AI utilities that run in the browser. Everything is free and processes data locally where possible.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the AIXO toolkit and featured tools.
- [AI Prompt Generator](/prompt-generator): Build structured, expert-level prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Midjourney in 20+ languages.
- [AI Image Combiner](/image-combiner): Merge unlimited PNG, JPG, or WEBP images into one clean grid — entirely in the browser.
- [About](/about): Mission, values, privacy commitment, and roadmap.
- [Contact](/contact): Support, feedback, feature requests, and bug reports.
